title: Pacific Smoked Australian Shrimp Skewers
description: A cultured and adventurous Australian dish featuring unsweetened coconut milk and shio-koji-cure, this recipe is perfect for those looking for a unique seafood experience. It is prepared on a cedar plank for added smokiness.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, shio-koji, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, salt, and black pepper.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and marinate for 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
Place the skewers on the cedar planks and grill for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the shrimp are pink and cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve the shrimp skewers hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Make sure to cook the shrimp to an internal temperature of at least 145 degrees Fahrenheit to ensure food safety.
